name: jrichlen
description: Synthetic known-good marketplace used by the counterfeit corpus. Not a real marketplace — it exists only so the cheap tier has a valid, minimal fixture to calibrate against.

plugins.name: sample-guard
plugins.description: A minimal known-good plugin: the calibration baseline the counterfeit corpus mutates. Emits a guarded destructive script, mirroring the graveyard discipline in miniature.
